goblin.name: Small Pouch of Coins
goblin.description: A little leather pouch filled with a handful of coins.

goblin.name: Goblin-Crafted Trinket
goblin.description: A crude necklace or ring made of bone or metal scraps.

goblin.name: Rotten Meat Rations
goblin.effect: Restores 5 HP; 20% chance to cause illness, reducing stats by -1 for 2 turns.
goblin.description: Goblins aren't picky about their food, but their rations are barely edible.

goblin.name: Shiny Pebble
goblin.description: Goblins love shiny things. It has no real value but can be traded for a few coins.

goblin.name: Cracked Health Potion
goblin.description: A poorly maintained health potion in a cracked glass bottle.

feral_rat.name: Rat Pelts
feral_rat.description: A small, tattered pelt from a feral rat.

feral_rat.name: Sharp Rat Teeth
feral_rat.effect: Can be crafted into crude jewelry or used as ingredients in some basic potions.
feral_rat.description: Broken-off teeth from a feral rat, sharp enough to be repurposed.

feral_rat.name: Disease-Infested Tail
feral_rat.effect: Ingredient for poisons or curses. Can be sold for 3-7 Gold.
feral_rat.description: A foul, diseased rat tail. Too dangerous to eat, but some potion makers may have a use for it.
